Description of changes / news: The design of the corresponding Han DD female inserts will be slightly modified because of production optimization requirements. The target is to increase the availability of the products. New Revision Old Revision 3. Impact on product specification: The technical characteristics according to the datasheet and also the quality characteristics are not affected. 4. Scheduled date of implementation: 2024-08-01 ( Articles 09161083101, 09161083111 and 09162083101 have already been modified in Q4/ 2023) 5. Identification of change: • The modified inserts will have a new revision level
